body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"active design hold in notes: cooldown until 2027-01-01 for dep ddx-c6317784 remains in effect until consolidated spec reviewed and committed: Bead body is well-formed — file:line evidence, named tests, clear go-test and lefthook gates, no /tmp references, self-contained description. Blocked by two active signals in the notes field: (1) explicit design hold with cooldown date 2027-01-01 for dep ddx-c6317784, which has not passed as of 2026-06-16; (2) notes declare TD-027 §28 the authoritative AC source superseding the enumerated criteria, creating ambiguity if the two diverge. Dep ddx-c6317784 also supplies the bead.BeadReader interface the proposed implementation requires; without it the code will not compile.","fingerprint":"61cd9ca81578f49237ad4031261c9a3b85680354cc936f110355f4b54f87c232","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"61cd9ca81578f49237ad4031261c9a3b85680354cc936f110355f4b54f87c232"}

{"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"dependency ddx-c6317784 must be closed before bead.beadreader and lifecyclesubscriber exist: Notes (2026-05-11) explicitly state a design hold remains active: 'cooldown until 2027-01-01 for ddx-c6317784 remains in effect until the consolidated spec package is reviewed and committed.' The dep ddx-c6317784 must land bead.BeadReader and the ctx-aware LifecycleSubscriber signature — both referenced in the proposed fix and AC1. Without those interfaces the implementation cannot compile. The bead body is otherwise high quality: root cause with file:line, named tests (TestWatcherHub_UsesProvidedFactory, TestWatcherHub_PropagatesFactoryErrors), clear non-scope, and standard go test + lefthook gates. It is immediately executable once the dep is closed and the spec hold is lifted.","fingerprint":"a8ba186bd0740ceecdb6fc69fa769217a2dcfa8097cdf52ac9d38db88458d3fb","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"a8ba186bd0740ceecdb6fc69fa769217a2dcfa8097cdf52ac9d38db88458d3fb"}

{"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"dep bead ddx-c6317784 must land before this bead can be executed: Dep bead ddx-c6317784 carries an explicit design hold with cooldown until 2027-01-01 per the 2026-05-11 notes — today is 2026-06-16, so the hold is still active. Current code confirms the dep has not landed: WatcherHub.SubscribeLifecycle at watcher.go:54 has the old signature '(projectID string) (\u003c-chan LifecycleEvent, func())' while the LifecycleSubscriber interface at backend.go:145-146 already requires '(ctx context.Context, projectID string) (\u003c-chan LifecycleEvent, func(), error)'. WatcherHub does not currently satisfy LifecycleSubscriber, so AC1's compile-time assertion would fail if attempted. The bead cannot be executed until the design hold on ddx-c6317784 is lifted and its signature changes are adopted. Additionally, TD-027 §28 is declared the canonical AC source superseding the prior plan doc, but cannot be verified without reading the document; if it also supersedes the 8-point AC in this bead's description, the agent would execute against stale criteria.","fingerprint":"2ac9ba703cf42d5a81f02169e4972b610c5b9037b2d759a8b43c995cc9fadcc2","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"2ac9ba703cf42d5a81f02169e4972b610c5b9037b2d759a8b43c995cc9fadcc2"}
